description: Second Edition publication workflow accompanying 'The Complete Siril & Seti Astro Suite Pro Processing Companion'. Optimized for OSC and Mono imaging with recommended defaults and user-selectable alternatives.

notes.function://ROTATION_DIALOG: Alternatively, you can make a selection, right-click it, and choose Crop.
notes.group://Sharpening#1d8677: Preferred: BlurXTerminator (RC-Astro). Alternatives: SyQon Parallax or native deconvolution. Inspect at 100% and avoid halos.
notes.function://ICC_DIALOG: Remove color profile if stretched image looks over saturated.
notes.group://Color Calibration#7a1d10: Preferred: SPCC. Alternative: PCC. Verify natural stellar colors before stretching.
notes.group://Background Extraction#1fc952: Preferred: AutoBGE. Alternatives: GraXpert AI, VeraLux Nox, or Manual Background Extraction. Preserve IFN and faint dust; avoid over-correction.
notes.group://Noise Removal#d5b2e3: Preferred: NoiseXTerminator (RC-Astro). Use SyQon Prism when preserving faint dust or IFN. Avoid a plastic appearance.
notes.group://Star Removal#7a0b52: Preferred: StarXTerminator (RC-Astro). Optional for galaxies and clusters; often beneficial for nebulae.
notes.group://Stretch the Data#ea5305: Preferred: Generalized Hyperbolic Stretch. Use Statistical Stretch for IFN and extremely faint dust.
notes.group://Curves Adjustment#de9985: Refine contrast conservatively while preserving natural color.
notes.group://Texture Enhancement#652222: Preferred: VeraLux Revela. Apply sparingly to avoid exaggerated texture.
notes.group://Contrast & Texture#652222: Select the contrast/texture tool you prefer.
notes.group://Restore Stars#32aa9b: Select the star composition tool you prefer.
notes.function://UNPURPLE_DIALOG: Use only if there is purple ringing around the stars.
notes.group://Color Grading#122acd: Preferred: VeraLux Vectra for subtle color refinement.
notes.function://CANON_FIXBANDING_DIALOG: Use only if you have horizontal or vertical banding in the image.
notes.function://BINXY_DIALOG: Use if your data is oversampled, and you want to resample it.
notes.function://COSMETIC_DIALOG: Use if the stacked image was not calibrated with a master-dark and you notice hot/cold pixels.
notes.function://EPF_DIALOG: used to reduce noise, and both preserve sharp edges and strong gradients in the image.
notes.function://DIALOG_FFT: Use if you want to remove unwanted frquencies.
notes.function://RESAMPLE_DIALOG: If you want to resample the image.
notes.function://RGRADIENT_DIALOG: Use to remove circular structures from an image in order to better highlight other details. It is particularly effective at revealing jets coming out of the nucleus of a comet.
notes.groupitem://1fc952|processing/GraXpert-A: GraXpert must be installed and configured.
notes.groupitem://1d8677|processing/GraXpert-A: GraXpert must be installed and configured.
notes.groupitem://d5b2e3|processing/GraXpert-A: GraXpert must be installed and configured.
notes.groupitem://7a0b52|function://STARNET_DI: Starnet command line tool must be installed and configured.
notes.groupitem://1d8677|RC-Astro/BlurXTermina: RC-Astro must be installed and configured.
notes.groupitem://d5b2e3|RC-Astro/NoiseXTermin: RC-Astro must be installed and configured.
notes.groupitem://7a0b52|RC-Astro/StarXTermina: RC-Astro must be installed and configured.
notes.groupitem://32aa9b|function://DIALOG_STA: Starnet command line tool must be installed and configured.
notes.function://SAVEAS_DIALOG: Save a 16-bit TIFF master before creating JPEGs.

author: Chuck Faranda
book: The Complete Siril & Seti Astro Suite Pro Processing Companion
